patch

FreeBSD uses different name for POWER architecture port than Linux.

Already upstreamed at https://github.com/nwchemgit/nwchem/commit/ce7c387b4f37c70947cb3b41a6beaf8fce628634 so you may as well just upgrade to newer snapshot.
